CREATE TABLE geometries (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
SELECT st_transform_by_custom_projection(geom, 'OLAEAPS', 20, 45) FROM geometries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT st_transform_by_custom_projection(geom, 'OLAEAPS', 0, 0) FROM geometries WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM geometries);
SELECT st_transform_by_custom_projection(geom, 'OLAEAPS', 90, NULL) FROM geometries WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geometries WHERE geom IS NOT NULL);
SELECT g.id, st_transform_by_custom_projection(g.geom, 'OLAEAPS', 15, 30) as transformed_geom FROM geometries g JOIN geometries g2 ON g.id <> g2.id;

SELECT g.id, (SELECT st_transform_by_custom_projection(geom, 'OLAEAPS', 25, 60) FROM geometries g3 WHERE g3.id = 2) as transformed_geom FROM geometries g WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM geometries g4 WHERE st_intersects(g.geom, g4.geom));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geometries WHERE st_transform_by_custom_projection(geom, 'OLAEAPS', 10, -20) IS NOT NULL;
